Utagawa Hiroshige II

3 works in the gallery.

View of Shichirigahama at Kamakura (Kamakura shichirigahama fūkei)
by Utagawa Hiroshige II
Japan · 1853
Sketch for Autumn Moon at Ishiyama Temple (Ishiyama no shugetsu), from the series "Eight Views in Omi Province (Omi hakkei)"
by Utagawa Hiroshige II
Japan · Japanese (culture or style) · 1854–1864 · Ink on paper
Kamakura and Kanazawa (Kamakura Kanazawa)
by Utagawa Hiroshige II
Japan · 1863
